name: Moloco
description: Machine learning-powered DSP for mobile app user acquisition and commerce media, focused on performance advertising.

seo.title: Moloco — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Moloco: Machine learning-powered DSP for mobile app user acquisition and commerce media, focused on performance advertising.

when_to_use: ML-powered mobile app install campaigns with ROAS optimization on Moloco DSP
Commerce media monetization for retail platforms via Moloco Cloud DSP
Privacy-preserving programmatic UA with on-device ML bidding
Retail media ad network monetization using Moloco's ML bidding engine

pros: Best-in-class ML bidding for mobile UA
Commerce media expansion opens new supply
cons: Opaque algorithm, hard to explain results
review.verdict: The ML-DSP benchmark for mobile UA if you can afford it and tolerate black-box bidding.
review.best_for: Apps spending $50k+/month on UA willing to trust the algorithm with budget.
review.not_for: Small budgets, transparency-first buyers, or teams needing managed creative services.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
